name: 2026 FIFA World Cup qualification - Wikipedia
snippet:
The 2026 FIFA World Cup qualification decided the 45 teams that joined hosts Canada, Mexico, and the United States at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

snippet: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be hosted by the United States, Mexico, and Canada, with a record 48 teams competing. CONMEBOL, UEFA, CAF, AFC, and OFC.
